steps.title: Use the discriminant condition
steps.content: A quadratic has exactly one real solution when its discriminant is $0$. For $-3x^2+24x+c=0$, use $a=-3$ and $b=24$.

steps.title: Solve for the constant
steps.content: Set the discriminant equal to $0$: $$24^2-4(-3)c=0$$ $$576+12c=0$$ $$c=-48$$ The answer is B.
